title: Antares Legal, VERTICES PARTNERS act on Sindhuja Microcredit pre-Series D fundraise
description: Rural-focused microfinance institution Sindhuja Microcredit has raised $5 million (₹47 crore) from a pre-Series D fundraise which saw participation from Abler Nordic, GAWA Capital, and Oikocredit.Antares Legal advised Sindhuja Microcredit, as well as existing investor Carpe Diem, on this fundraise.The transaction team consisted of Surbhi Kothiala (Partner) and Associates, Divyanshu Bansal and Garima Thukral.Surbhi KothialaVERTICES PARTNERS advised the investors – Abler Nordic, GAWA Capital,
